generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorSideEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑side encoder measuring joint angle and its derivative "
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorSideEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearWheelEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear‑wheel‑side encoder measuring joint angle and its derivative "
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearWheelEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M; speed and torque derived via motor constants "
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorSideEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSideEncoder
]

instance GearWheelEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearWheelEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance SimulatedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    // Simulated data stream produced by simulation execution
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorSideAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured joint angle from motor‑side encoder "
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSideEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ComparisonEnabler
]

instance GearWheelAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured joint angle from gear‑wheel‑side encoder "
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearWheelEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ComparisonEnabler
]

instance CurrentSensorDataPoints : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M from current sensor "
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler, ComparisonEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataPoints : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque computed from measured current and motor constants "
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComparisonEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityDataPoints : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity computed from encoder signals "
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSideEncoderDataTransmitted, GearWheelEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComparisonEnabler
]

instance SimulatedCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated input current from Simulink motor model "
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComparisonEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated joint angle from Simulink system model "
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComparisonEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque from Simulink model "
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComparisonEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity from Simulink model "
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComparisonEnabler, FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance StructuralSysMLModelAxis : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML BDD and IBD of axis structural model for MABI MAX 100 first axis "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model: Coulomb‑Viscous "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model: Stribeck "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model: Dahl "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model: LuGre "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxDataDrivenFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black‑box data‑driven friction model "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑Simulink block modeling the synchronous motor "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑Simulink block modeling the gearwheel "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑Simulink block modeling the gear‑box "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB‑Simulink block composing motor, gearwheel, gearbox, and system dynamics "
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBridgeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles realtime MQTT data streaming from sensors to Digital Shadow "
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTDataStreamingService
]

instance SimulationExecutionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes Simulink simulation stack for motor, gearwheel, gearbox, and system "
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs continuous friction identification using white‑box and black‑box models "
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance ComparisonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Compares simulated and measured signals for diagnostics "
    DTDFVocab:enables ComparisonService
]

instance ModelSwitchEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables dynamic switching of friction models during operation "
    DTDFVocab:enables DynamicFrictionModelSwitchService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides live visualization in custom dashboard "
    DTDFVocab:enables LiveVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance MQTTDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that streams sensor data via MQTT to Digital Shadow in real‑time "
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveDataStreamingInsight
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs simulation for the system combining motor, gearwheel, gearbox, and axis "
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationRunInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that identifies friction parameters from continuous data and updates model "
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight, MotorTorqueAdjustmentInsight, JointWearDiagnosticsInsight, ImprovedMotionAccuracyInsight, UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance ComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares simulated and measured signals for diagnostics "
    DTDFVocab:provides CompareSignalsInsight
]

instance DynamicFrictionModelSwitchService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that switches the active friction model during operation "
    DTDFVocab:provides SwitchFrictionModelAction
]

instance LiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that provides live visualization of data in dashboard "
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveVisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated friction parameters derived from continuous identification "
]

instance MotorTorqueAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for motor torque adjustments "
]

instance JointWearDiagnosticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostics on joint wear "
]

instance ImprovedMotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved motion accuracy for machining tasks "
]

instance LiveDataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Realtime streaming of PT sensor time‑series via MQTT "
]

instance SimulationRunInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation execution completed for system combining motor, gearwheel, gearbox, and axis "
]

instance CompareSignalsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated and measured signals "
]

instance LiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualization of data in dashboard "
]

instance UpdateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update friction parameters to improve robot motion accuracy "
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RecommendMotorTorqueAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommend motor torque adjustments based on identification "
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SwitchFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Switch friction model during operation "
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time, continuous data exchange with sampling rates sufficient to capture robot dynamics (up to the actuator bandwidth of ~75°/s); simulation models run in parallel and are synchronized with measurement data"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central Digital Shadow consisting of a processing component that consumes sensor traces, applies engineering, simulation, and data‑driven models to generate simulated outputs; a set of data traces (reference and simulated) linked via AAS; a visualization dashboard; and the physical robot as the source."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow is instantiated during operation (operated stage), built upon design‑time engineering models (as designed), and enriched with measurement data from the manufactured robot; it thus spans the design → manufacture → operation lifecycle phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "White‑box analytical models capture physical friction physics; black‑box data‑driven models bypass parameter identification; both are validated against live measurement data in real time; traceability ensures each data point’s provenance; uncertainty from wear, temperature, load is mitigated by continuous reidentification; simulation fidelity is limited by simplifications of gear geometry but sufficient for comparative analysis."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way data flow from PT to DT via MQTT broker; the Digital Shadow receives serialized sensor data (current, position) and sends processed data to the dashboard; no direct bidirectional control channel is described."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for modeling (ISO/IEC 15929), Asset Administration Shells (IEC 62832/IEC 62196) as part of Industry 4.0 standards; reference to Digital Shadow Reference Model; adherence to MBSE practices (RFLP, SPES)."
]
